case_title: OSAZUWA M IYAMU VS. EMIRATES AIRLINE SAN FRANCISCO INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OSAZUWA M IYAMU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMERIATES AIRLINE SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY AAKANKSHA, SENIOR SALES EXECUTIVE WESTERN US EMIRATES IS PRESENT. AS OF 5:40 PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT EMERIATES AIRLINE SAN FRANCISCO WAS EXCUSED FROM COURT AT 5:40 P.M. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AT 5:50 P.M. AND INFORMED THAT HIS CASE HAS BEEN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NON APPEARANCE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
